method: Five fresh-search runs per engine, 950 ms per run, MultiPV 3; first run treated as warm-up and the middle NPS of the remaining four reported.
environmentNote: Absolute throughput is hardware/runtime dependent. Both engines were measured sequentially in the same Node.js process and environment.
notes: v4 adds a direct-mapped evaluation cache and capture-history ordering.
Position/PV caches improve repeated-line latency but are not reflected by this fresh-search benchmark.
NPS is not Elo and selective-search node counts are not perfectly comparable across versions.
